violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at 200ppm Chlorine. *Ensure Sani bucket is maintained at 100ppm.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Dishes were being washed then sanitized, missing the rinse step. *Ensure all dishes are Washed, Rinsed, Sanitized and then air dried.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Pot lid in hand sink basin upon arrival. *COS-Moved lid to dish pit.
